name: Your Name
title: Senior UX Designer / Director of Product Design
summary: 2-3 sentence professional summary used as the foundation for cover letters and tailoring notes. Write in first person. Focus on your core strengths, domain expertise, and what you bring to an organization.

bullets: Led end-to-end design for [product], reducing user error rate by 30%.
Built and maintained a component library used across 4 product lines.
Partnered with PMs and engineers to ship [feature] on a 6-week timeline.
Redesigned the onboarding flow, increasing activation rate from 40% to 67%.
Facilitated design sprints with stakeholders across 3 business units.
Established the team's first accessibility review process.

writing_rules: No em dashes — rewrite the sentence instead.
No formal framing phrases ('This aligns directly with', 'This underscores').
No constructed parallel trios ('X, Y, and Z' as a rhetorical device).
Active voice. Vary sentence length. Concrete examples over abstractions.
Direct declarative sentences. First person in reflective writing.
